title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Grofers Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Grofers Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Grofers Logistics! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Grofers Logistics:
Grofers Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Logistics!
